text: 唔该，杯冻奶茶等咗好耐喇。
cantonese: 唔该，杯冻奶茶等咗好耐喇。
jyutping: m4 goi1, bui1 dung3 naai5 caa4 dang2 zo2 hou2 noi6 laa3.
mandarin: 麻烦你，我这杯冰奶茶等很久了。
english: Excuse me, I have been waiting a long time for this iced milk tea.
translation: Excuse me, I have been waiting a long time for this iced milk tea.

jyutping: sin1 saang1, maa5 soeng6 lai4, ngaam1 ngaam1 ceot1 gan2.
mandarin: 先生，马上来，刚刚正在做。
english: Sir, it is coming right away. It is being prepared now.
translation: Sir, it is coming right away. It is being prepared now.

text: 你哋次次都系咁讲㗎喎。
cantonese: 你哋次次都系咁讲㗎喎。
jyutping: nei5 dei6 ci3 ci3 dou1 hai6 gam2 gong2 gaa3 wo3.
mandarin: 你们每次都是这样说的。

notes.meaning: 句尾语气，带提醒或质疑

text: 唔好意思，今日厨房真系好忙。
cantonese: 唔好意思，今日厨房真系好忙。
jyutping: m4 hou2 ji3 si1, gam1 jat6 cyu4 fong2 zan1 hai6 hou2 mong4.
mandarin: 不好意思，今天厨房真的很忙。
english: Sorry, the kitchen is really busy today.
translation: Sorry, the kitchen is really busy today.

text: 得啦得啦，快啲得唔得呀？
cantonese: 得啦得啦，快啲得唔得呀？
jyutping: dak1 laa1 dak1 laa1, faai3 di1 dak1 m4 dak1 aa3?
mandarin: 好了好了，快一点行不行？
english: Fine, fine. Can you hurry up a bit?
translation: Fine, fine. Can you hurry up a bit?

jyutping: dak1, ngo5 bong1 nei5 ceoi1 jat1 ceoi1.
english: Alright, I will chase it up for you.
translation: Alright, I will chase it up for you.

text: 喂，三号台杯冻奶茶仲未出？
cantonese: 喂，三号台杯冻奶茶仲未出？
jyutping: wai3, saam1 hou6 toi4 bui1 dung3 naai5 caa4 zung6 mei6 ceot1?
mandarin: 喂，三号桌的冰奶茶还没出吗？
english: Hey, table three's iced milk tea isn't out yet?
translation: Hey, table three's iced milk tea isn't out yet?

text: 嚟紧啦，你同客人讲声对唔住先。
cantonese: 嚟紧啦，你同客人讲声对唔住先。
jyutping: lai4 gan2 laa1, nei5 tung4 haak3 jan4 gong2 seng1 deoi3 m4 zyu6 sin1.
mandarin: 马上来了，你先跟客人说声对不起。
english: It's coming. Go apologize to the customer first.
translation: It's coming. Go apologize to the customer first.

text: 先生，真系唔好意思，请饮多杯柠檬茶。
cantonese: 先生，真系唔好意思，请饮多杯柠檬茶。
jyutping: sin1 saang1, zan1 hai6 m4 hou2 ji3 si1, ceng2 jam2 do1 bui1 ning4 mung4 caa4.
mandarin: 先生，真的很抱歉，请再喝杯柠檬茶。
english: Sir, we are truly sorry. Please have another lemon tea on us.
translation: Sir, we are truly sorry. Please have another lemon tea on us.

text: 算啦，唔该快啲上我个公仔面。
cantonese: 算啦，唔该快啲上我个公仔面。
jyutping: syun3 laa1, m4 goi1 faai3 di1 soeng6 ngo5 go3 gung1 zai2 min6.
mandarin: 算了，麻烦快点上我的方便面。
english: Forget it. Just please bring my instant noodles quickly.
translation: Forget it. Just please bring my instant noodles quickly.

text: 即刻到！冻奶茶同公仔面，係咪？
cantonese: 即刻到！冻奶茶同公仔面，係咪？
jyutping: zik1 haak1 dou3! dung3 naai5 caa4 tung4 gung1 zai2 min6, hai6 mai4?
mandarin: 马上到！冰奶茶和方便面，对吗？
english: Right away! Iced milk tea and instant noodles, right?
translation: Right away! Iced milk tea and instant noodles, right?

text: 係啊，仲要多份西多士，走甜。
cantonese: 係啊，仲要多份西多士，走甜。
jyutping: hai6 aa3, zung6 jiu3 do1 fan6 sai1 do1 si6, zau2 tim4.
mandarin: 是的，还要多一份西多士，不要甜的。
english: Yes, and one more French toast, no syrup.
translation: Yes, and one more French toast, no syrup.

text: 好，总共八十五蚊，先俾定钱？
cantonese: 好，总共八十五蚊，先俾定钱？
jyutping: hou2, zung2 gung6 baat3 sap6 ng5 man1, sin1 bei2 ding6 cin2?
mandarin: 好，一共八十五块，先付钱吗？

jyutping: bei2 laa1, m4 goi1 zaau2 sap6 ng5 man1 ngo5.
english: Here. Please give me 15 dollars change.
translation: Here. Please give me 15 dollars change.

text: 收你一佰，找十五，多谢帮衬。
cantonese: 收你一佰，找十五，多谢帮衬。
jyutping: sau1 nei5 jat1 baak3, zaau2 sap6 ng5, do1 ze6 bong1 can3.
mandarin: 收你一百，找十五，多谢惠顾。
english: 100 received, 15 change. Thanks for your patronage.
translation: 100 received, 15 change. Thanks for your patronage.

text: 食完喇，环境一般，但味道ok嘅。
cantonese: 食完喇，环境一般，但味道ok嘅。
jyutping: sik6 jyun4 laa3, waan4 ging2 jat1 bun1, daan6 mei6 dou6 ok1 ge3.
mandarin: 吃完了，环境一般，但味道还可以。
english: Finished eating. The environment is average, but the taste is OK.
translation: Finished eating. The environment is average, but the taste is OK.

text: 下次早啲嚟就唔使等咁耐喇。
cantonese: 下次早啲嚟就唔使等咁耐喇。
jyutping: haa6 ci3 zou2 di1 lai4 zau6 m4 sai2 dang2 gam3 noi6 laa3.
mandarin: 下次早点来就不用等这么久了。
english: Come earlier next time and you won't have to wait so long.
translation: Come earlier next time and you won't have to wait so long.

jyutping: zi1 dou3 laa3, zau2 sin1, baai1 baai1!
